docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF'S ANSWER ON SC-105, FILED. THERE IS ALREADY A COURT ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT'S SC-105 ON FILE.
PLAINTIFF OPPOSITION TO REQUEST FOR POSTPONEMENT
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HEUER, JEFF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEON, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEUER, JEFF $687.16 PRINCIPAL, $111.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $798.16, DEFENDANT CAN PROPERLY DEDUCT THE FOLLOWING FROM THE ORIGINAL $1200.00 DEPOSIT: $100.00 FOR PAINTING, $50.00 FOR CLEANING, $152.79 FOR PASS THROUGH AND $216.75 FOR SEPT. RENT. DEFENDANT OWES PLAINTIFF INTEREST OF $6.70 (TOTAL = $687.16). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850, FILED. REQUEST GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "DENIED". COPY SENT TO PARTIES.

TRIAL RESET TO JAN-13-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER (SC-105A) ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY THE DEFENDANT IS "DENIED". THE VALIDITY OF THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT SHALL BE DECIDED AT THE TRIAL.
